_comment: Structure reference only — placeholder copy, safe to commit. Copy this file to prompt-templates.local.json (gitignored) and replace template_text with real copy before running `npm run seed:prompt-templates`. 27 real combinations (repetitive x compliance x data) plus exactly one is_fallback row are expected.

templates.template_text: PLACEHOLDER: describe the {business_type} solution for a repetitive task, no compliance concerns, organized data. Reference {layer1_problem}, {layer1_elimination}.
PLACEHOLDER fallback template for combinations with no direct match. Reference {business_type}, {layer1_problem}, {additional_notes}.
